receive_month.text: ประจำเดือน

as_name.default: นางรวีวรรณ ช่อดอก

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id ,sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_desc ,sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping ,sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_name ,(select manager_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping ) as manager_name ,'!as_letter!' as as_letter , '!adtm_date!' as adtm_date , to_tdate( '!adtm_date!' , 'month') as tadtm_date ,( case sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_no when '0' then 'ห้วยขวาง' when '1' then 'อโศก - ดินแดง' when '2' then 'ย่อยกระทรวงแรงงาน' else 'ศาลาว่าการกรุงเทพมหานคร 2' end ) as case_branch ,( case sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_no when '0' then '033- 1 - 10056 - 8' when '1' then '056 - 1 - 23934 - 7' when '2' then '383 - 0 - 02007 - 4' else '688-0-00451-2' end ) as case_bank ,'!as_name_1!' as as_name ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.receive_year ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.receive_month ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.salary_time ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_no ,(select member_group_name from sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group where member_group_keeping = sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_no ) as agent_name ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.post_status ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.post_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_coopname () as coop_name ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.keeping_amount as c_sum ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_kep_m_agent_send.keeping_amount)::double precision) as thai_sum ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.keeping_balance ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.keeping_amount - sc_kep_m_agent_send.keeping_balance as keeping_receive ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.count_return ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.return_amount ,substr( sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_no ,2,2) as group_1 ,substr( sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_no ,5,7) as group_2 ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_amount ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_balance ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_amount - sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_balance as agent_receive ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_count_return ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_return
, ( sc_kep_m_agent_send.keeping_amount - sc_kep_m_agent_send.keeping_balance ) + ( sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_amount ) as keep_post
,sc_kep_m_agent_send.count_mem
FROM sc_kep_m_agent_send ,sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control WHERE ( sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping = sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_no ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id = sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.control_id and (sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.keeping_fingroup = sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping)
/*WHERE*/ -- and sc_kep_m_agent_send.receive_year = 2020 -- and sc_kep_m_agent_send.receive_month = 7 -- and sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping between '011001' and '042099' -- and sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_no = '011001' ; order by sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id ,sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.receive_year ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.receive_month ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.salary_time ,sc_kep_m_agent_send.agent_no
